song.title: There is Power in the Blood
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Would you be free From your burden of sin? There’s pow’r in the blood, Pow’r in the blood; Would you o’er evil a victory win? There’s wonderful pow’r in the blood.
[C] Chorus There is pow’r, pow’r, Wonderworking pow’r, In the blood of the Lamb; There is pow’r, pow’r, wonderworking pow’r, In the precious blood of the Lamb.
[V2] 2) Would you be free From your passion and pride? There’s pow’r in the blood, Pow’r in the blood; Come for a cleansing to Calvary’s tide, There’s wonderful pow’r in the blood.
[v3] 3) Would you be whiter, Much whiter than snow? There’s pow’r in the blood, Pow’r in the blood; Sin-stains are lost In its life-giving flow, There’s wonderful pow’r in the blood.
[V4] 4) Would you do service For Jesus your King? There’s pow’r in the blood, Pow’r in the blood; Would you live daily His praises to sing? There’s wonderful pow’r in the blood.
song.author: Lewis E. Jones
